requirement_topic.en: OCPP, Telecom Resilience, and IEC 61000 EMC / Power Quality
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP、电信韧性及IEC 61000 EMC / 电能质量
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP、電信韌性及IEC 61000 EMC / 電能質量

summary.en: Networked South Sudan charger projects should define OCPP back-office requirements, payment or access-control method, remote diagnostics, firmware update procedure, data logging, and cyber-security responsibility in the project specification. Telecom coverage and grid quality may be unreliable, so chargers should be validated for intermittent cellular service, local fallback operation, diesel-generator supply, voltage dips, surges, harmonics, and load management. IEC 61000-series EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared for the final 230/400 V, 50 Hz configuration.
summary.zh: 南苏丹联网充电桩项目应在项目规范中定义OCPP后台要求、支付或访问控制方式、远程诊断、固件升级流程、数据记录和网络安全责任。电信覆盖和电网质量可能不稳定，因此充电桩应针对间歇性蜂窝网络、本地降级运行、柴油发电机供电、电压暂降、浪涌、谐波和负载管理进行验证。最终230/400 V、50 Hz配置应准备IEC 61000系列EMC和电能质量证据。
summary.zht: 南蘇丹聯網充電樁項目應在項目規範中定義OCPP後台要求、支付或訪問控制方式、遠程診斷、固件升級流程、數據記錄和網絡安全責任。電信覆蓋和電網質量可能不穩定，因此充電樁應針對間歇性蜂窩網絡、本地降級運行、柴油發電機供電、電壓暫降、浪湧、諧波和負載管理進行驗證。最終230/400 V、50 Hz配置應準備IEC 61000系列EMC和電能質量證據。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked chargers
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-24 — digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV
ISO 15118 where required by CCS2 project specification

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and the vehicle battery management system. That protocol does not provide OCPP back-office integration and is not the CCS2 communication stack. China operator back-office protocols or China-only cellular modules also may not match a South Sudan project owner's OCPP, SIM, router, data-retention, or remote-support requirements.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间。该协议不提供OCPP后台集成，也不是CCS2通信栈。中国运营商后台协议或中国专用蜂窝模块也可能不符合南苏丹项目业主对OCPP、SIM卡、路由器、数据留存或远程支持的要求。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間。該協議不提供OCPP後台集成，也不是CCS2通訊棧。中國運營商後台協議或中國專用蜂窩模塊也可能不符合南蘇丹項目業主對OCPP、SIM卡、路由器、數據留存或遠程支持的要求。

standards_or_laws: China EMC evidence for domestic 220/380 V, 50 Hz configurations

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the required OCPP version, security profile, offline operating mode, SIM and router bands, payment integration, local support workflow, event logging, and firmware update policy. EMC and power-quality reports should cover the final Type 2 / CCS2 hardware, 230/400 V input, weak-grid or generator-backed operation, surges, voltage dips, conducted emissions, radiated emissions, harmonics, and load-management behaviour. GB/T 27930 does not replace OCPP or CCS2 communication.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认所需OCPP版本、安全配置、本地离线运行模式、SIM卡和路由器频段、支付集成、本地支持流程、事件日志和固件升级政策。EMC和电能质量报告应覆盖最终Type 2 / CCS2硬件、230/400 V输入、弱电网或柴油发电机供电、浪涌、电压暂降、传导发射、辐射发射、谐波和负载管理行为。GB/T 27930不能替代OCPP或CCS2通信。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認所需OCPP版本、安全配置、本地離線運行模式、SIM卡和路由器頻段、支付集成、本地支持流程、事件日誌和固件升級政策。EMC和電能質量報告應覆蓋最終Type 2 / CCS2硬件、230/400 V輸入、弱電網或柴油發電機供電、浪湧、電壓暫降、傳導發射、輻射發射、諧波和負載管理行為。GB/T 27930不能替代OCPP或CCS2通訊。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific — mandatory where the owner, CPO, donor, utility, or fleet specification requires OCPP, remote monitoring, EMC evidence, or load management
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible and does not satisfy CCS2 or project back-office integration requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Networked South Sudan chargers should specify OCPP, telecom fallback, and IEC 61000 EMC / power-quality evidence for the final 230/400 V configuration. GB/T 27930 alone is not a back-office or CCS2 communication solution.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 南苏丹联网充电桩应为最终230/400 V配置明确OCPP、电信降级方案和IEC 61000 EMC / 电能质量证据。仅有GB/T 27930不能作为后台或CCS2通信方案。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 南蘇丹聯網充電樁應為最終230/400 V配置明確OCPP、電信降級方案和IEC 61000 EMC / 電能質量證據。僅有GB/T 27930不能作為後台或CCS2通訊方案。
